_comment: WO-105 ship spec (extends the WO-94 preview spec): the three fluid nets ship as P&ID sheets plus the contract graph; GroupHead realizes geometry (mech drawing + 3D + massed BOM row); boilers/panels carry identity rows with honestly-empty mass. The control board realizes no outline inputs; firmware carries no caller-held bytes (AD-22) -- named-absent families. WO-105 ship fix: BrewBoiler/SteamBoiler realize no geometry (programs not convertible), so they ride the augment-only bom.lines identity rows -- the mech step-export family requires RealizedGeometry per assembly row.

assembly.subject: GroupHead.body
assembly.description: Group head body, machined CW614N brass
